jobline.quoteDescription: RLQ306147 PO- 1152 55x114mm PE White AP901 + GV SET PRICING JUL 2024 - 3000
jobline.Supply: Join rolls where applicable to provide one large roll
jobline.lineDescription: Size: 55mm x 114mm||Material: PE AP901||Print Colour: CMYK||Tool: D0010(4,5)(0,1)1mm Rectangle||Provided on 76mm Cores||Finishing: GLOSS VARNISH||MACHINE APPLIED||Supply: Join rolls where applicable to provide one large roll||The Studio 260||Camco Engineering 530||Ray White Bondi - David 530||Far West 284||Liverpool Mazda 1396||
jobline.deliveryToAddress: Active Premium Beverages ||Dock 2, 23-25 Fairfield Street ||Old Guildford NSW 2161
